name: shell-doc
title: DocShell layout
description: Notion-style sidebar + content card. Sidebar with brand, search, nav, footer. Sticky topbar with breadcrumbs + theme toggle + settings menu. Bundled with command palette, keyboard cheatsheet, and shortcut toasts. This is the playground's chrome, emptied of content.
postInstall: Wire <ShellProviders><AppShell>{children}</AppShell></ShellProviders> into your root (Next.js: src/app/layout.tsx, Vite: src/App.tsx).
Edit src/lib/nav.ts to set your routes.
Edit the brand (logo + name) in src/components/app-shell.tsx.
